title: RAG Data
description: Manage and view your RAG files.

action.upload: Click to upload or drag and drop

upload.hint: Drop files here or choose from your device. Uploads are processed into the selected project's RAG store.
upload.supportedTypes: Supported: PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT up to 50 MB each

tagDialog.title: Edit tags
tagDialog.description: Manage tags for {{fileName}}. Press enter to add a tag.
tagDialog.inputPlaceholder: Enter a tag and press Enter
tagDialog.helper: Tags are saved in file metadata.
tagDialog.label: Tags

table.title: Uploaded Files
table.description: Browse and manage files stored in this project.

emptyState.title: No files found.
emptyState.description: You don't have any RAG files yet. Add a file to get started.
emptyState.missingProjectDescription: This screen needs an active project context before it can load RAG files.

validation.noValidFiles: None of the selected files are supported.

messages.partialRejected: {{count}} file(s) were skipped because they are not supported or exceed the size limit.
messages.uploadError: Failed to upload the selected file(s).
messages.downloadError: Unable to prepare the download link.
